summary: Excellent field recording captured with a Neumann KM‑140, Aerco pre‑amp and Sony D‑10 tape deck
review: The sole review provides a detailed gear list – Neumann KM 140 cardioid mic in a mesh baseball hat, Aerco pre‑amp, Sony D‑10 recorder and 110° ORTF placement – indicating a high‑fidelity audience capture. No musical commentary is offered, but the five‑star rating suggests listeners consider the tape quality superb.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focused on recording equipment; it praises the gear and gives a 5‑star rating, implying excellent sound despite lack of show details.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Neumann KM 140 mic in mesh hat, Aerco pre‑amp, Sony D‑10 tape recorder, FOB setup, 110° ORTF pattern – all point to a clear, well‑balanced capture.
